data.content:
Implementation review: APPROVED.

QUALITY GATES (all green):
- bun run lint: PASS (no errors)
- bunx tsc --noEmit: PASS (no errors)
- bun run test: PASS (311 files, 3109 tests, 11 skipped, 42 todo)
- bun run build: PASS (Next.js production build succeeded)

DIFF REVIEW: clean, focused, well-commented.
- Adds normalizeOpenCodeModel + helper extractOpenCodeTrailingVersion (~58 lines, both well-documented)
- Replaces 7-line passthrough in normalizeAgentIdentity with new branch using parser
- Special-cases toCanonicalLeaseIdentity for OpenCode to skip flavor/model join (avoids router double-stamp)
- 14 new test cases covering all AC shapes plus regression for the leaked-4.7 bug

NO REGRESSIONS:
- All existing agent-identity tests pass unchanged.
- No changes to display path (parseAgentDisplayParts at line 459 already had its own parseOpenCodeModelPath helper unchanged).

Ready to advance to ready_for_shipment.
